interferenceChecks.description: Tray body (assembled at X=2.35, Y=160.0, Z=4.0) does not intersect cradle slot walls or floor. Boolean mesh intersection confirmed zero volume via trimesh/manifold.
Brother PT-P750W reference box (78x152x143mm at X=15..93, Y=3..155, Z=4..147) does not intersect cradle printer pocket walls. Boolean mesh intersection confirmed zero volume.

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-x
fitChecks.note: Analytical from spec dims. Slot W=103.9mm (X=2.05..105.95), tray W=103.2mm. Total X play=0.70mm = 0.35mm per side when tray self-centers.

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-y
fitChecks.note: Slot depth=94.9mm, tray body depth=94.2mm. Y play=0.70mm. Tray back wall flush with slot back when fully inserted. Pupil emboss protrudes 3mm past cradle front face (slot open, intentional).

fitChecks.name: tray-slot-clearance-z
fitChecks.note: Slot H=42.3mm, tray H=41.6mm. Z play=0.70mm. Tray rests on slot floor (Z=4.0). Slot top at Z=46.3, tray top at Z=45.6, delta=0.7mm. Slot also open at top.

fitChecks.name: printer-pocket-clearance-x
fitChecks.note: Analytical from spec. Pocket X=14..94 (80mm), printer X=15..93 (78mm). Gap=1.0mm per side (left and right). Matches spec printer_clearance_xy=1.0mm.

fitChecks.name: printer-pocket-clearance-y
fitChecks.note: Analytical from spec. Pocket Y=3..157 (154mm), printer Y=3..155 (152mm). Printer back face rests against back panel interior (Y=3, 0mm gap at back). Front clearance=2mm. Total gap=2mm distributed as 0mm back + 2mm front — printer sits flush against back wall by design. Effective per-side clearance = 1mm (total gap / 2).

additionalChecks.name: cable-u-notch
additionalChecks.description: Cable U-notch confirmed open at Z=0 (no floor, no bridge), rising to Z=20mm. 25mm wide centered at X=54. Back panel above Z=20 is solid. Verified from modeling-report feature description.

additionalChecks.name: tray-recess-in-slot
additionalChecks.description: Tray top at Z=45.6mm (assembled), cradle shelf wall top at Z=46.3mm. Tray is recessed 0.7mm below shelf top. Tray does not stand proud of the cradle slot. PASS.

additionalChecks.name: ear-tuft-printer-clearance
additionalChecks.description: Ear tufts occupy Y=0..3 (back panel exterior face), X=11..36 (left) and X=72..97 (right), Z=144..180. Printer occupies Y=3..155. Tufts and printer share the Y=3 boundary plane (tuft front face = back panel interior = printer back face) with zero volumetric overlap. The printer rests against the back panel interior — this is expected by design. Ear tufts are on the EXTERIOR of the back wall; they do not protrude into the printer pocket at any Z height. No interference. Note: printer top is at Z=147, which is 2mm above back panel body top (Z=145) and inside the ear tuft Z range (144..180), but at Z=145..147 the printer back face (Y=3) and tuft front face (Y=3) remain coplanar with no overlap.

additionalChecks.name: tray-emboss-orientation
additionalChecks.description: Tray pupil embosses protrude in tray local +Y direction (from front face). In assembled position, this faces cradle Y-max (front of cradle, outside the slot). Emboss protrudes to Y=257.2mm vs cradle front at Y=254.9mm — sticks out 2.3mm past cradle front. This is the user-facing owl face; slot clearance is correctly measured against tray body Y=94.2mm, not mesh bbox Y=97.2mm. Confirmed: emboss does not interact with slot walls.

specDeviationNotes: Prompt described tray slot Y as 98.9mm; actual spec value is tray_slot_interior_d=94.9mm (confirmed). The 94.9mm figure is correct and consistent with shelf section depth (Y=160..254.9 = 94.9mm).

Printer pocket Y clearance is asymmetric: printer back rests flush against back wall (0mm), front has 2mm gap. Total gap = 2mm = 2x spec 1.0mm/side. This is expected behavior (printer pushed back) and not a defect.
Tray positioning in slot leaves 0.7mm total play on each axis (X, Y, Z). Per spec the sliding-fit offset is 0.35mm per side, giving exactly 0.70mm total, which matches all three axes.
notes: Both interference checks (tray/cradle and printer/cradle) confirm zero mesh intersection volume via trimesh boolean operations.
All tray slot clearances (X=0.35mm/side, Y=0.7mm body, Z=0.7mm) match the spec sliding-fit offset of 0.35mm per side exactly.
Printer pocket X clearance of 1.0mm per side matches spec printer_clearance_xy=1.0mm exactly.
Cable U-notch is bridge-free (open at Z=0) and solid above Z=20mm as designed.
Tray sits 0.7mm recessed in slot — does not stand proud of cradle shelf top.
Ear tufts do not interfere with printer volume; they are external back-panel features only.
Measurement method: interference volumes via trimesh boolean (manifold engine); clearances via analytical spec-dimension calculation cross-checked with mesh bounding box verification.
